_template.id: REQUIRED — YouTube video ID from the URL: youtube.com/watch?v=<ID>
_template.title: OPTIONAL — shown in the modal header (falls back to key name if omitted)
_template.description: OPTIONAL — short text shown below the modal header
_template._start_note: OPTIONAL — number of seconds to skip at the start. e.g. 30 means the video begins playing from the 0:30 mark instead of from the beginning. Useful when the relevant content starts mid-video.
_template.playlist: OPTIONAL — YouTube playlist ID; maps to ?list= in the embed URL
